# Code of Conduct

## The short version

Be direct. Be respectful. Help each other.

## Expected behavior

- Give constructive feedback
- Accept feedback without taking it personally
- Focus on the content, not the person
- Be patient with new contributors

## Unacceptable behavior

- Personal attacks or insults
- Harassment of any kind
- Spam or self-promotion
- Submitting content you did not create or verify

## Enforcement

Violations reported to the maintainer will result in:
1. First offense: warning
2. Second offense: temporary ban from contributing
3. Severe or repeated violations: permanent ban

Report issues by opening a private issue or contacting the maintainer directly.
